field_values.action_summary: Carter tends to Dejah and reveals he is an Earthman. Tars Tarkas approaches, warning him of the danger his actions have caused. Carter responds with a defiant declaration of his intent to protect Dejah according to his own conscience.
field_values.emotional_beat: Tenderness to intense confrontation and defiance.
field_values.camera_intent: Two-shots between Carter and Tars Tarkas; close-ups of Carter's defiant expression; medium shots of Dejah being tended to.
movement_notes: the items/weapons Carter now carries from the dead warrior.
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC005

- chapter_id: `CH010`
- scene_title: `Confrontation and character establishment.`

## Production Intent

Confrontation and character establishment.

## Storyboard

Carter tends to Dejah and reveals he is an Earthman. Tars Tarkas approaches, warning him of the danger his actions have caused. Carter responds with a defiant declaration of his intent to protect Dejah according to his own conscience.
